common.companyName: Jiangsu Hongji Metal Materials Co., Ltd.

home.banner1Subtitle: Professional manufacturer integrating R&D, production and sales of stainless steel pipeline accessories
home.banner2Subtitle: Products exported to over 50 countries across Southeast Asia, Middle East, Europe and Americas
home.banner3Subtitle: Certified by ISO9001, PED, AD2000 and other international standards
home.productsSubtitle: Professional manufacturing of various stainless steel fittings, flanges and prefabricated parts
home.aboutDesc: Jiangsu Hongji Metal Materials Co., Ltd. is a modern enterprise specializing in the R&D, manufacturing and sales of stainless steel, alloy steel, carbon steel and other pipeline accessories. Located in Jiangsu Province, the company possesses advanced production equipment and comprehensive testing systems, with products widely used in petrochemical, power energy, marine engineering, nuclear power and other industries.
home.industriesSubtitle: Products widely used across major industrial sectors

about.introDesc: Established in 2010, Jiangsu Hongji Metal Materials Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise specializing in R&D, manufacturing and sales of stainless steel, alloy steel, carbon steel pipeline accessories. With registered capital of 50 million RMB, covering 30,000 square meters, the company has modern workshops and office facilities.
about.introDesc2: The company owns over 100 sets of advanced forging, machining, welding and other production equipment, equipped with spectral analyzers, ultrasonic flaw detectors, X-ray inspection equipment and other precision testing instruments, establishing a comprehensive quality management system.
about.introDesc3: Main products include various stainless steel fittings (elbows, tees, reducers, caps), flanges (forged flanges, slip-on flanges, weld neck flanges), prefabricated parts and pipeline accessories, widely used in petrochemical, power energy, marine engineering, nuclear power, natural gas/LNG industries.
about.milestone2010: Company established, started stainless steel fittings production
about.milestone2015: PED European Pressure Equipment certification obtained
about.milestone2019: New modern workshop put into production
about.visionDesc: To become a globally leading specialty alloy pipeline accessories supplier
about.missionDesc: Win trust through quality, create value through service

products.prefabricatedDesc: Professional pipe prefabrication including elbow, tee and pipe assembly prefabrication
products.buttWeldDesc: Elbows, tees, reducers, caps and other butt weld fitting series
products.flangesDesc: Slip-on, weld neck, socket weld flanges, blind flanges and more
products.fittingsDesc: Various standard and non-standard pipe fittings

facilities.equipmentDesc: The company owns over 100 sets of advanced forging equipment, CNC machine tools, automatic welding equipment, ensuring product precision and production efficiency.
facilities.testingDesc: Equipped with German imported spectral analyzers, ultrasonic flaw detectors, X-ray inspection equipment, hydraulic testing machines and other precision testing instruments, CNAS laboratory certified.
facilities.warehouseDesc: With 5,000 square meters of modern warehouse space, capable of storing various standard products, ensuring fast delivery.

industries.subtitle: Products widely used across major industrial sectors, providing professional pipeline accessories solutions
industries.petrochemicalDesc: Providing corrosion-resistant and high-temperature pipeline accessories for oil refining and chemical production facilities.
industries.powerDesc: Providing high-quality pipeline accessories for thermal, wind and other energy projects, supporting clean energy development.
industries.marineDesc: Providing special alloy pipeline accessories with seawater corrosion resistance for marine engineering and shipbuilding.
industries.nuclearDesc: Qualified for nuclear equipment manufacturing, providing nuclear-grade pipeline accessories for nuclear power plants.
industries.gasLngDesc: Providing cryogenic pipeline accessories solutions for natural gas transmission and LNG terminal projects.
industries.pharmaFoodDesc: Providing sanitary stainless steel pipeline accessories for pharmaceutical and food industries, meeting GMP standards.

contact.addressValue: Economic Development Zone, Dongtai City, Yancheng, Jiangsu, China
